import { useEffect, useState } from "react"; import axios from "axios"; function Leads() { const [data, setData] = useState({}); // default role set to super_admin (you can change to "admin" if needed) const [selectedRole, setSelectedRole] = useState("super_admin"); const [showDecrypted, setShowDecrypted] = useState(false); // Fetch leads whenever role or decryption changes useEffect(() => { const fetchLeads = async () => { try { const res = await axios.get("http://localhost:8000/leads", { params: { role: selectedRole, decrypted: showDecrypted ? 1 : 0 } }); setData(res.data); } catch (error) { console.error("Error fetching leads:", error); setData({}); } }; fetchLeads(); }, [selectedRole, showDecrypted]); const toggleEncryptDecrypt = () => { setShowDecrypted(prev => !prev); }; return (
